# Aditya Sinha — AI, Analytics & Commercial Strategy Leader

> Aditya Sinha is an AI and analytics expert with 7+ years across Tier-1 finance (Goldman Sachs, J.P. Morgan) and high-growth consumer tech (Good Glamm Group, Careem). He builds applied AI, machine-learning, and pricing systems that turn data into revenue.

## About

Aditya Sinha is an AI, analytics, and commercial strategy leader based in New Delhi, India. He started at Goldman Sachs structuring M&A transactions and now builds the AI and commercial systems that move revenue — working at the intersection of applied AI, machine learning, pricing science, and GTM execution. He holds an MBA in Finance from NMIMS, a B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from Delhi Technological University (Delhi College of Engineering), an Artificial Intelligence Micro-Certification (AIC), and a Post Graduate Certificate in Data Science. He is open to AI, analytics, revenue-operations, and commercial-strategy leadership roles.

## Current Role

- **Digital Analytics Manager at Careem (Nov 2025 – Present)** — Remote, United Arab Emirates
  - Optimizing cross-channel marketing spend via incrementality A/B tests across TikTok, Meta, and Google (potential annualized burn reduction of USD 100,000)
  - Developing growth product strategies through competitor benchmarking and marketing analytics
  - Leading a cross-functional team building an AI-led creative intelligence layer — automated pipelines that benchmark competitor ads and surface data insights

## Work Experience

- **Head of Analytics at MyGlamm · Good Glamm Group (Mar 2021 – Apr 2026)** — New Delhi, India
  - Owned the GTM redesign delivering +15% YoY revenue growth across a 1,000Cr+ GMV D2C business
  - Built an in-house AI-driven dynamic pricing system that cut discount dependency by 35% and expanded contribution margin (CM2) by 25%
  - Designed ML-driven inventory placement, cutting shipment splits by 75% and saving ₹13Cr/month in logistics costs with zero added headcount
  - Rolled out in-house AI-powered (LLM) customer service agents that lifted NPS by 14%
  - Delivered 40+ custom dashboards across revenue, user, social, and product analytics
  - Promoted from Business Analyst to Head of Analytics within a year

- **Analyst — CIO & Treasury at J.P. Morgan (Mar 2020 – Mar 2021)** — Mumbai, India
  - Validated risk and compliance models and assessed daily capital movements aligned with U.S. Federal Reserve policy
  - Drafted regulatory briefings for senior leadership and streamlined documentation standards

- **Investment Banking Analyst at Goldman Sachs (Apr 2019 – Feb 2020)** — Bengaluru, India
  - Conducted sector-level investment analysis used in live deal recommendations
  - Built commercial due-diligence frameworks and contributed to 75+ investor materials per quarter
  - Automated data-validation workflows, cutting manual reconciliation time by ~40%

## Key Skills

- AI & Machine Learning: Applied AI, Machine Learning, LLM Applications, Generative AI, AI-Driven Pricing, Data Science
- Analytics: SQL, Python, Tableau, Looker, BigQuery
- Commercial & Growth: GTM Strategy, Pricing Strategy, Commercial Planning, Revenue Operations, Product Analysis, Performance Marketing
- Finance: Financial Modeling, Valuation, Due Diligence, M&A, Regulatory Compliance

## Certifications

- Post Graduate Certificate in Data Science
- Product Launches Micro-Certification (PRLC)
- Strategy Consulting Bootcamp
- Certificate Program in International Business Environment

## Education

- MBA, Finance — SVKM's Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies (NMIMS), 2017–2019
- B.Tech, Electrical Engineering — Delhi Technological University (Delhi College of Engineering), 2012–2016

## Featured AI & Analytics Projects

- AI-Driven Dynamic Pricing Engine — in-house pricing system; -35% discount dependency, +25% CM2
- ML-Driven Inventory Placement — -75% shipment splits, ₹13Cr/month savings
- In-House LLM Customer Support Agents — +14% NPS with generative-AI agents
- AI Creative Intelligence Layer — automated AI pipelines benchmarking competitor ads
- Marketing Incrementality Testing — USD 100K+ potential annual marketing burn reduction
- Executive Analytics & KPI Suite — 40+ dashboards as a single source of truth
